security.csp: default-src 'self' customprotocol: asset:; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Evidence workbench for a specific second-hand home transaction.
bundle.longDescription: A local-first, fail-closed evidence workbench for evaluating a specific second-hand home transaction in China.
